user_feedback: demanded more comprehensive expert coverage - 5 panels not enough

Found missing moat, Close in 60 mode, investor network gaps
11-dim scoring invisible, pre→post meeting disconnected, competitive intel doesn't drive action
Morning briefing page design, quick capture design

computeOptimalFollowupTiming/NetworkCascades/EngagementVelocity invisible in daily workflow

failure_reason: identified issues but deferred fixes to next cycle
notes: CRITICAL: unhandled JSON.parse, missing fetch timeouts, 47 inconsistent error routes

user_feedback: furious about unpushed commits — local commits not on GitHub
notes: Cycle 40 — 6 features: velocity dashboard (/velocity), competitive intel dashboard (/competitive), meeting outcome tracking (PATCH), enriched data on investor detail, auto-research trigger on new investor, intelligence recent research section. 6 commits pushed to GitHub. 1,683 new lines.

Cycle 41 — 3 features: network cascade visualization (/network, 725 lines), deal heat map (/deal-heat, 529 lines), term sheet economics engine (/term-compare, 1040 lines). Compare Terms button on terms page. Sidebar updated. 5 commits pushed. 2,294 new lines.
Cycle 42 — 3 features: win/loss analysis (/win-loss, 1119 lines), raise forecast (/forecast, 918 lines), FOMO dynamics (/fomo, 1227 lines). Sidebar updated. 4 commits pushed. 3,264 new lines.

Cycle 43 — 3 enhancements: data room access intelligence (763 lines), objection effectiveness tracking (1178 lines), enriched dashboard with velocity/hot-deals/followups/activity (510 lines). 3 commits pushed. 2,451 new lines.

user_feedback: demanded product thinking — not just adding features
notes: Cycle 45 — Core UX Reliability: 7 loading skeletons, 7 error boundaries, Today page staleness indicator + auto-refresh + empty states, JSON.parse safety (7 fixes across 6 files). Zero new features — focused on making existing daily workflow bulletproof. 22 files changed, 665 insertions.

Cycle 46 — Product polish: hero raise progress widget on dashboard (forecast vs target as first element), pipeline summary strip (7 metrics), overdue follow-up visual urgency (red borders + Xd overdue labels + sort first). 3 files, 170 insertions.
Cycle 47 — Command Palette (Cmd+K): keyboard-first navigation with investor search, 15 page shortcuts, 5 quick actions, full arrow/enter navigation. Sidebar hint added. Layout updated. 445 new lines.

Cycle 48 — UX consistency: loading skeletons + error boundaries for all 8 remaining sidebar pages (Dealflow, Forecast, Objections, Intelligence, Documents, Data Room, Terms, Settings). All 15 sidebar pages now have consistent loading/error UX. Copy polish on 6 core pages (dashboard subtitle, pipeline empty columns, investors empty states, focus subtitle, meetings/followups empty copy). 22 files, 485 insertions.

Cycle 49 — Quality of life: custom SVG favicon (blue rise arrow), enhanced OG metadata + theme-color, custom 404 page with Dashboard/Today links. Middleware auth already existed (123 lines, HMAC auth + rate limiting + seed protection).

Cycle 50 — AI insight surfacing: Today page gets non-blocking strategic insight card (purple, from /api/intelligence/strategic). Dashboard gets Day X of 60 pill next to raise progress hero. Both degrade gracefully.

Cycle 51 — Follow-up message drafts: template-based draft message generation per action type (thank-you, objection, data share, schedule, re-engagement, milestone). PenLine button + expandable draft panel with subject/body + copy-to-clipboard. Stats strip responsive 3-col/5-col. 187 new lines. Turns follow-ups from tracking into execution.

Cycle 52 — Meeting engagement intelligence: per-investor enthusiasm trend arrows (up/down/flat), meeting count badges, avg enthusiasm tooltip. All computed from existing meetings data — zero new API calls. 79 insertions.
Cycle 53 — Pipeline staleness indicator: days-in-stage on each kanban card, color-coded (neutral/warning/danger at 7d/14d thresholds). Instantly see which deals are stuck without clicking through.
Cycle 54 — Focus page: deal heat flame icon (composite focus+momentum), last meeting type shown, open flags count, top objection blocker inline
Cycle 55 — Forecast page: what-if scenario modeling with investor toggles, per-investor estimated capital, exclusion recalculation, reset button. Zero API changes.
Cycle 56 — Today page: raise day counter with progress bar ('Day X of 60'), color shifts at 75%+, days remaining, fetches velocity API non-blocking
Cycle 57 — Velocity page: contextual action buttons (Rescue/Nudge/View) per tracking status, cross-page navigation from velocity to meetings/followups/investor detail

Cycle 58 — Strategic page: smart action buttons on every recommendation (keyword-derived routing to meetings/followups/data-room/objections/etc). Forecast investor names now clickable → dealflow search.

Cycle 59 — Dashboard+Dealflow: Hot deal rows get 'Schedule' button → meetings/new. Follow-up rows get 'Act' button → filtered followups. Dealflow bottleneck column now smart-linked based on keyword analysis.
Cycle 60 — Investor detail: deal intelligence strip (heat, tracking, velocity, bottleneck, action buttons). Non-blocking fetch from deal-heat+velocity APIs. Log Meeting button now passes investor ID.
Cycle 61 — Today page: overnight changes section from pulse API (status changes, new meetings, completed tasks). Non-blocking fetch.
Cycle 62 — Intelligence page: action buttons (Schedule + Follow-up) on briefs with investor_id. Closes the last insight→action gap from the 4-page audit.

changes: followups: investor_id param passed to API fetch, filter indicator badge with clear link

today: inline Follow-ups Due section with quick Done/Skip buttons, overdue badges, investor links, toast feedback, items removed on completion
command-palette: added 13 missing pages (velocity, strategic, momentum, network, stress-test, reports, timeline, win-loss, term-compare, model, deal-heat, acceleration, enrichment)
command-palette: investor-context quick actions (Log meeting with X, Follow up with X, Prep for X) with URL param pre-fill
meetings/prep: Suspense wrapper + useSearchParams, auto-selects investor from ?investor= param
investor detail: Next Action now has Do it button with smart keyword-based routing to meeting/followup/prep/data-room/objections pages, investor ID pre-filled
sidebar: live overdue follow-up count badge (red pill, refreshes every 3min, caps at 9+)
meetings/capture: accepts both ?investor= and ?investor_id= params
Added last_meeting_date to Investor type
Modified getAllInvestors() with LEFT JOIN meetings subquery
Added Last Contact column with staleness color-coding (green/neutral/yellow/red)
Added Clock icon for >14d stale investors
observations: Investor CRM now shows operational staleness data
Color coding: ≤3d green, ≤7d neutral, ≤14d yellow, >14d red with icon
Prevents leads going cold during fundraise

changes: Pipeline cards now show actual last_meeting_date instead of updated_at

observations: Pipeline board is now operational - you can act from the board without navigating away
Last contact from real meeting data is much more meaningful than 'updated_at' which changes on any field edit

Fixed Capture link to include ?investor= param
Added meetingCount, enthusiasm, investorId, captureLink to briefing API

observations: Dashboard was action-thin despite having 12 API calls of data
